zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Payne Tibetot於1353年出生在英國坎布利其爾時，他的父親Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead40歲，母親Elizabeth Aspall Baroness of Tibetot33歲。他於1375年與Agnes Wroth在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1413年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Payne Tibetot于1353年出生在英国坎布利其爾时，他的父亲Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead40岁，母亲Elizabeth Aspall Baroness of Tibetot33岁。他于1375年与Agnes Wroth在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1413年在英国英格兰坎布利其爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Payne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Payne Tibetot was born in 1353, in Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead, was 40 and his mother, Elizabeth Aspall Baroness of Tibetot, was 33. He married Agnes Wroth in 1375, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1413, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Payne Tibetot est né en 1353, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Aspall Baroness of Tibetot, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Wroth en 1375, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1413, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Payne Tibetot 1353 in Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead 40 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Aspall Baroness of Tibetot 33. Er hat 1375 in England Agnes Wroth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1413 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Payne Tibetot è nato il nel 1353 nel Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Aspall Baroness of Tibetot, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Wroth nel 1375, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1413, nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Payne Tibetotが1353年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlesteadは40歳，母Elizabeth Aspall Baroness of Tibetotは33歳であった。1375年にイギリスでAgnes Wrothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1413年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Payne Tibetot(이)가 1353년 영국 캄브리지실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Aspall Baroness of Tibetot(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1375년 영국에서 Agnes Wroth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1413년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Payne Tibetot nasceu em 1353, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Aspall Baroness of Tibetot, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Wroth em 1375, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1413, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Payne Tibetot родился в 1353 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Aspall Baroness of Tibetot, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Wroth в 1375 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1413 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Payne Tibetot nació en 1353, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Tibetot 2nd Baron of Nettlestead, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Aspall Baroness of Tibetot, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Agnes Wroth en 1375, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1413, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
